news.t: Harris Associates L.P. Announces Launch of Oakmark U.S. Large Cap ETF

holdings.infoBox: OAKM is an equity ETF with a total of 40 individual holdings. The top holdings are State Street stock at 4.50%, Citigroup at 4.25%, Targa Resources at 4.07%, Keurig Dr Pepper at 3.82%, and Elevance Health at 3.47%.

overview.description: The Oakmark U.S. Large Cap ETF (OAKM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed, high-conviction fund holding fewer than 40 US large-cap value stocks. The investment process utilizes bottom-up research, seeking competitive long-term performance return. OAKM was launched on Dec 3, 2024 and is issued by Oakmark.

data.title: 3 Great Stock ETFs Run by Exceptional Managers

data.title: Harris Associates L.P. Announces Launch of Oakmark U.S. Large Cap ETF
